name: small law firm paralegals managing 5–10 cases/month tool
description: For small law firm paralegals processing 5–10 cases/month, missed legal filing deadlines cause potential penalties. We automate deadline tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: small law firm paralegals managing 5–10 cases/month

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small law firm paralegals processing 5–10 cases/month, missed legal filing deadlines cause potential penalties. We automate deadline tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of deadlines using spreadsheets
